description_long: This is a modern, boxy armchair upholstered in a dark, textured fabric with a subtle woven pattern. The chair features thick, plush seat and back cushions, providing ample comfort and support. Both sides are flanked by wide, padded armrests that are integrated into the overall cubic form of the chair. The backrest is slightly reclined and generously cushioned, matching the seat in both material and pattern. The base of the chair is solid and low to the ground, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and contemporary appearance. Its robust construction and soft upholstery make it suitable for comfortable seating in urban lounges, waiting areas, or residential living spaces.
description: A modern, boxy armchair with thick, dark woven fabric upholstery, wide armrests, and plush seat and back cushions. The chair has a solid, grounded base and a contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the wide left armrest, thick seat cushion, and plush backrest.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the right armrest, deep seat, and the chair's overall cubic shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest cushion and the solid, continuous back panel.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the length of the armrest and the seamless, low base.
